description: Product description Crimson Pomegranate – Product Description Crimson Pomegranate by Lissi Aroma London is a rich and vibrant scented candle designed to fill your home with a luxurious fruity fragrance. Inspired by the deep sweetness of ripe pomegranate, this elegant scent creates a warm and inviting atmosphere that feels both refreshing and sophisticated. Crafted with natural soy wax, this candle provides a clean and even burn while gently releasing its beautiful aroma throughout your space. The candle is presented in a premium glass jar with a wooden lid, combining modern simplicity with timeless style that complements any room. Perfect for relaxing evenings, cozy gatherings, or simply adding a touch of elegance to your home, Crimson Pomegranate brings a sense of warmth and comfort wherever it is placed. Its refined fragrance and stylish design also make it a thoughtful gift for birthdays, housewarmings, or special occasions. Product Details Fragrance: Crimson Pomegranate Wax: Natural Soy Wax Weight: 320g Jar: Premium Glass Jar Lid: Natural Wooden Lid Brand: Lissi Aroma London Experience the beauty of luxurious home fragrance with Lissi Aroma Crimson Pomegranate, a candle designed to elevate everyday moments. Safety Warning Always trim the wick before lighting. Keep away from direct sunlight and flammable materials. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Burn for no more than 4 hours at a time. Discontinue use when 1/2 inch of wax remains.
